import React, { useState } from 'react' import { AMT_CONFIRM_BTN_TEXT, AMT_PLACEHOLDER } from '../constants' import useSplitPaymentStore from '../useSplitPaymentStore' function TotalAmount() { const [inputVal, setInputVal] = useState(0) const setTotalAmount = useSplitPaymentStore((s) => s.setTotalAmount) return (
setInputVal(e.target.value)} />
) } export default TotalAmount
